campaigns.name: AI Simplification
campaigns.objective: Position Fresh Run Demo as the bridge between business needs and AI capabilities, achieving 25% ROI within 90 days for target enterprises
campaigns.targetAudience: Medium businesses (50-500 employees) struggling with AI adoption, lacking technical expertise but recognizing the competitive necessity of AI implementation
campaigns.positioning: AI without the jargon — we translate business problems into AI solutions and demonstrate measurable ROI within 90 days, eliminating the skills gap that causes 60% of AI projects to fail
keyMessages: Data silos and skills gaps are killing AI ROI — we fix both
25% ROI within 90 days or your investment is ours
No technical expertise required — we bridge the gap between business needs and AI capabilities
contentThemes: Case studies showing real ROI from AI implementation in similar-sized businesses
Educational content on overcoming common AI adoption pitfalls (data quality, skills gaps)
Industry-specific AI success stories with measurable business outcomes
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture through LinkedIn thought leadership and SEO-optimized content
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture and educate via email sequences, webinars, and ROI calculator engagement
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff through progressive profiling and intent signals
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture

campaigns.name: ROI Proven
campaigns.objective: Demonstrate tangible business value through measurable outcomes and calculator engagement, driving 21X faster response times and 5-minute SLA adoption
campaigns.targetAudience: C-level executives and operations leaders actively evaluating AI solutions but skeptical about ROI without clear proof points
campaigns.positioning: ROI before features — our calculator and case studies show exactly how much value you'll capture before you commit to implementation
keyMessages: See your ROI before you commit — calculator shows 25%+ gains in 90 days
60% of AI projects fail — we're the 40% that succeed
21X faster response = 5-minute SLA for qualified leads
contentThemes: ROI calculator case studies and testimonials
Comparative analysis: why 60% of AI projects fail and how Fresh Run Demo succeeds
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — calculator landing page promotion and benchmark content distribution
Phase 2: Consideration — ROI nurture sequences and intent-based content delivery
Phase 3: Conversion — high-intent lead routing with 1-hour response SLA
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — calculator landing page promotion and benchmark content distribution

infrastructure.funnelStrategy: Multi-touch attribution funnel where prospects enter through LinkedIn organic reach or SEO blog content, engage with progressive profiling forms (2-3 fields top-of-funnel, 8-10 fields bottom-funnel), and move through email nurture sequences based on behavior (calculator downloads, webinar registrations). Lead scoring moves prospects from 0-30 (FIT) to 0-40 (INTENT) to 0-30 (TIMING), with automated routing at 40+ points (MQL), 60+ (SQL), and 80+ (hot lead).
conversionPaths: Primary: ROI Calculator → Demo Request → BANT-Q Qualification → Sales Handoff
Secondary: LinkedIn Content → Blog Deep Dive → Webinar Registration → Email Nurture → Demo Request
infrastructure.nurtureApproach: Behavior-triggered email sequences: 5-day nurture for webinar registrations, 7-day for calculator downloads, and 3-touch LinkedIn outreach for cold prospects. Content escalates from educational (AI basics) to problem-aware (data silos, skills gaps) to solution-focused (ROI proof). All sequences include social proof and measurable outcomes.

scoringSignals: Form completion depth (2 points per additional field)
Email engagement (1 point per open, 2 points per click)
leadQualification.qualificationThreshold: 80+ points = hot lead (1-hour response), 60-79 points = SQL (24-hour response), 40-59 points = MQL (48-hour response)
leadQualification.routingGuidance: Automated routing to sales queue with SLA-based notification. Hot leads trigger immediate alert, SQL leads create task for same-day contact, MQLs enter weekly review cadence.

salesHandoff.owner: Sales team with BANT-Q qualification framework (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline, Quality)
salesHandoff.process: CRM integration with automated lead scoring, real-time engagement tracking, and BANT-Q score calculation. Sales receives lead with full engagement history, calculator results, and content preferences.
requiredContext: Engagement history (content consumed, calculator results, form responses)

measurementPlan: Lead response time SLA achievement (90% within threshold)
Cost per qualified lead (target reduction 20% QoQ)
